name: Rizhao Port Co., Ltd.
summary: Rizhao Port Co., Ltd. provides cargo handling and storage services in China. It is involved in the handling and storage of ore, coal, cement, nickel ore, aluminum, vanadium, steel, coke, grain, wood chips, and other bulk cargoes, as well as crude oil, liquid chemicals, and containers. The company is based in Rizhao, China.
